creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At a glance: 

* the same error in fallout

* the same error here, with a borrowed computer. 

root@mowa219-gjp4-freebsd-transcend:~ # uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-freebsd-transcend 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n261544-cee09bda03c8: Thu Mar 16 08:11:20 UTC 2023     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64 1400082 1400082
root@mowa219-gjp4-freebsd-transcend:~ # poudriere jail -i -j main
Jail name:         main
Jail version:      14.0-CURRENT 1400082
Jail vcs version:  b754d7faa
Jail arch:         amd64
Jail method:       git+https
Jail mount:        /usr/local/poudriere/jails/main
Jail fs:           zroot/poudriere/jails/main
Jail updated:      2023-03-18 01:30:37
Jail pkgbase:      disabled
root@mowa219-gjp4-freebsd-transcend:~ #
